creator: john@sanren.ac.za
text:
Created attachment 251632
port of google-earth-pro-7.3.6 including some linux-c7 ports

I found that the latest poudriere-devel in ports handles linux port correctly.

Here is a new patch with all the linux-c7 ports passing poudriere testport.

I have removed linux-c7-gstreamer1--plugins-base and combined it with linux-c7-gstreamer1.

google-earth-pro still fails poudriere testport when PREFIX != LOCALBASE. I think it is because the port is trying to put some stuff in LINUXBASE and some in PREFIX.

Suggestions or fixes are welcome.
